new_posts.title: Dedicated security review command now available in Copilot CLI
new_posts.summary: You can now run a security review on your code changes directly from GitHub Copilot CLI. The new /security-review slash command is shipping as an experimental feature in public preview,…

new_posts.title: Claude Fable 5 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
new_posts.summary: Claude Fable 5 from Anthropic is now available in GitHub Copilot, the first model in Anthropic’s Mythos class, designed for long-horizon, autonomous coding and knowledge-work tasks. Unlike ot

new_posts.title: Security validation for third-party coding agents
new_posts.summary: Security validation for third-party coding agents is now generally available. GitHub supports third-party coding agents (including Claude and OpenAI Codex) that work directly within your repositori

new_posts.title: GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex deprecated
new_posts.summary: As of today, June 5, 2026, we have deprecated the following models across most GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions). NoteR

new_posts.title: Enterprise-managed plugins in VS Code in public preview
new_posts.summary: Last month we launched a public preview with Copilot CLI that allows enterprise administrators the ability to configure and distribute plugins to GitHub Copilot CLI users across their enterprise. V
